title: Ability to change order in Calendar view
excerpt:

posts.author: Roni_Aviram (Roni)
posts.cookedHtml:
As of today, in the calendar view, all the items are arranged in the order determined by the system.
It would be amazing if it would be possible to sort the items according to a certain type, according to the user’s choice - by status, owner, type, length of timeline etc.

This is an example of tasks without a clear and fixed order:
